title: RiskVerdict
description: Output of the Risk Gate (docs/algorithms/AUTOMATION-PIPELINE.md §3 Stage D). Evaluated after a ConfluenceDecision, even when automation=allow.

decision_id.description: ConfluenceDecision.id this verdict was computed for.

ok.description: True only if every check in `checks` passes and confluence.automation != deny.

size.description: Sized paper position (units/lots, tunable). Null when ok=false. MVP: sizing is virtual/paper only — see risk.policy Max risk per trade <=0.5% equity.

risk_per_trade_pct.description: Percent of paper equity risked at `size`/`stop`, when ok=true.

daily_loss_r.description: Running R-multiple loss for the current trading day (session_date), used against the -2R halt policy.

open_positions.description: Current open paper positions on XAUUSD (max 1 in MVP).

deny_reasons.description: Stable deny codes. Empty when ok=true.

checks.description: Per-rule pass/fail explainability map, one entry per policy row in AUTOMATION-PIPELINE.md §3 Stage D. true = passed.

grade_floor.description: Live requires A+; paper allows A (per §3 Stage D table). MVP has no live path, so this effectively gates confirm-eligibility only.
